name: nvm
description: Nevermind: an AI-native command palette for your desktop
author: Pablo Varela

scripts.test: pnpm build && node --check dist/main/main.js && node --check dist/preload/preload.cjs && node scripts/check-packaged-runtime-imports.cjs && node scripts/check-design-system.cjs && node scripts/check-internal-extensions.cjs && node scripts/check-clone-safe-actions.cjs && node scripts/check-packaged-resources.cjs && node scripts/check-backend-contract-fixtures.cjs && node scripts/check-backend-api-major.cjs && pnpm -C backend exec node --import tsx --test ../src/model-contract.test.ts ../src/use-ai-chat.test.ts ../src/extension-view.test.tsx ../src/electron/calculator.test.ts ../src/electron/url-utils.test.ts ../src/electron/running-app-status.test.ts ../src/electron/app-icon-cache.test.ts ../src/electron/app-index-service.test.ts ../src/electron/shortcut-ownership.test.ts ../src/electron/extension-permissions.test.ts ../src/electron/extension-ui-api.test.ts ../src/electron/ipc-registration.test.ts ../src/electron/app-ipc-handlers.test.ts ../src/electron/extension-window-manager.test.ts ../src/electron/window-navigation-policy.test.ts ../src/view-patches.test.ts && pnpm typecheck && pnpm -C backend test
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac zip --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac zip --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:x64: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux AppImage deb --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:arm64: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux AppImage deb --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win:x64: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never
